title: [Gene] Fix model routing rate limits
description: Gene registry match: applying 'gene_repair_model_routing_rate_limit' (success_rate=100%) to address 'rate_limit' in 'api_call' tasks.

implementation.changes:
Run live discovery to rebuild config with working models:
  uv run python skills/intelligent-router/scripts/discover_models.py --auto-update
Then verify tier primaries are correct:
  uv run python skills/intelligent-router/scripts/tier_classifier.py

validation_criteria: Monitoring task routes to SIMPLE tier (glm-4.7-flash or qwen2.5-7b)
expected_improvement: Eliminate rate_limit failures on model_routing tasks
deployment_notes: Manually applied 2026-03-05: HEARTBEAT.md updated + router rate_limit fallback + context_loss prevention added
